MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANCHAL, DHAVAL SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-04-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-12-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN JURY ROOM. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. PLTF. REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH SACRAMENTO ATTORNEY. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. SEE CLERKS MINUTES FOR DETAILS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARION, CHARLES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 730 EDDY STREET, ROOM 320, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, STAYED UNTIL DEC-03-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY OF EVICTION TO 12-3-94 AT 5:00PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & FEES. PLTFF TO RETAIN ANY LAST MONTHS RENT AND SECURITY DEPOSIT AND INTEREST THEREON. PLTFF TO RETAIN ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY UPON RECOVERY OF POSSESSION.
